case_title: CORK SUPPLY USA INC VS WATERBROOK WINERY INC

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER CORK SUPPLY USA INC AS TO RESPONDENT WATERBROOK WINERY ,INC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RESPONSE TO PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD; REQUEST TO CORRECT THE CONTRACTUAL ARIBTRATION AWARD FILED BY RESPONDENT WATERBROOK WINERY ,INC VINFIN CORP.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER CORK SUPPLY USA INC

NOTICE OF PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD AND OF MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER CORK SUPPLY USA INC HEARING SET FOR OCT-06-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
RESPONSE TO PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY RESPONDENT VINFIN CORP.
REPLY TO RESPONSE TO PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD AND MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PETITIONER CORK SUPPLY USA INC
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-06-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER CORK SUPPLY USA, INCORPORATED'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD AND OF MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS, PETITION IS CONFIRMED AS AGAINST VINFIN. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD AND GRANTING MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS NO SASE, COPY IN OUTBOX OF 301
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD AND MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PETITIONER CORK SUPPLY USA INC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER CORK SUPPLY USA INC RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT VINFIN CORP. $202,450.00 PRINCIPAL, $3,285.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $205,735.00, SEE SCANNED DOC
